arts.ttl: Chelsea vs Barrow – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea welcome fourth-tier Barrow to Stamford Bridge in the third round of the Carabao Cup on Tuesday evening. Enzo Maresca will be expected to use the full depth of his expensively-assembled squad, with several names hoping for a chance to impress at Stamford Bridge.
